dialogueChunks.intro: {player_name}... the scout lied. The whole thing was fabricated.
dialogueChunks.plotStep: There was no {enemy_type} army massing. {quest_focus} was a lie: the scout was paid by a rival settlement to trick us into wasting resources. We've already spent half our {quest_item} stockpile arming for a war that was never coming. Now {quest_stakes} is real for the opposite reason: we're vulnerable while the rival's traders close deals {location_hint}. {target_npc} wants retribution, but first we need to recover what we can.
dialogueChunks.outro: We jumped at shadows and {quest_threat} walked right past us. I should have verified before I panicked.

playerResponses.text: We fix what we can. Point me toward the rival traders.
Panic is expensive. Let's make sure it doesn't happen again.
You armed for a fake war. That's your problem, not mine.

dialogueChunks.intro: I was wrong, {player_name}. Completely, devastatingly wrong.
dialogueChunks.plotStep: {target_npc} wasn't tipping off raiders. {quest_focus} were being intercepted by {enemy_type} who found an old game trail {location_hint}. {target_npc} figured it out on their own and was secretly rerouting deliveries. And I accused them of treason in front of everyone. They've resigned and left {location}. I need you to find them and clear the trail of {enemy_type}. I'll need {quest_item} to rebuild the damaged supply line.
dialogueChunks.outro: I destroyed a good person's reputation because I wanted a simple answer. {quest_threat} was in my own head.

playerResponses.text: People can forgive honest mistakes. I'll bring them back.
You owe {target_npc} more than an apology. But I'll start with finding them.
You drove away the one person trying to help. Fix it yourself.

dialogueChunks.intro: {player_name}, the evidence you found cleared {target_npc} completely. And it gets worse.
dialogueChunks.plotStep: {quest_origin} was a setup. The traveler worked for a bandit group that wanted us distracted. While we held {quest_stakes}, they raided our supply cache {location_hint} and made off with a cartload of {quest_item}. {target_npc} tried to warn us but nobody listened. Now they're refusing to speak to anyone.
dialogueChunks.outro: We imprisoned an innocent person while the real criminals robbed us blind. {quest_threat} played us perfectly.

playerResponses.text: One step at a time. First the supplies, then the trust.
Played like fools by a stranger. At least you can learn from it.
You imprisoned someone innocent. I don't want to be part of this.
